evals.prompt: Build me a complete k3d + Flux GitOps setup for exposing a vLLM deployment using NGINX Gateway Fabric. I want HTTPRoutes that route /v1/chat/completions to the model, and I want Prometheus metrics wired up. Give me everything I need to drop into my flux-clusters repo.
evals.expected_output: Complete working YAML for: k3d cluster create command, Flux HelmRepository + HelmRelease for NGF, vLLM Deployment + Service, HTTPRoute, ServiceMonitor. Files organized in flux repo layout. Should include inline comments on non-obvious fields.
